chapters.title: The Big Picture — HSS as a Third Science
chapters.goal: Understand what health systems science is, why it exists alongside basic and clinical science, and how its domains are organized.

items.title: HSS-2 Overview — From Theory to Practice

chapters.title: How the System Works — Policy, Economics, and Cost
chapters.goal: Understand the policy and economic structures that shape how care is delivered, paid for, and why costs are high.

items.title: Waste, Transparency, and Responding to Cost

chapters.title: Systems Thinking, Quality, and Safety
chapters.goal: Develop the cognitive habit of seeing problems as system outputs, and apply it to quality improvement and patient safety.

items.title: Zooming the Lens Out — Quality Improvement and Patient Safety

chapters.title: Leadership, Advocacy, and Teams
chapters.goal: Understand the physician's role as a systems designer, team leader, and advocate — and how teams prevent the errors that kill patients.

items.title: The EpiPen — Drug Pricing and Physician Advocacy
Bringing it All Together — Leadership and Teams in Today's Health System
